message:
feat(cli): overhaul validate command with structured diagnostics pipeline

Redesign the validate command to produce rich, machine-readable
diagnostics by collecting warnings and errors from every pipeline stage
(parse, layout, render) into StructuredDiagnostic payloads.

Replace the old --json/--strict flags with:
  --format (text|json|pretty) for output format selection
  --fail-on (none|hint|info|warning|error) for CI severity gating
  --diagnostics-out <path> for writing JSON artifact files

Replace the ad-hoc ValidationWarning/ValidationError types with a
unified ValidationDiagnostic struct that wraps StructuredDiagnostic and
tags each entry with its pipeline stage.

Add multi-stage diagnostic collection:
  - collect_parse_diagnostics: init warnings/errors, IR diagnostics,
    and unstructured parse warnings with remediation hints
  - collect_structural_diagnostics: unknown diagram type, empty diagrams
  - collect_layout_diagnostics: empty bounds, cycle edge reversals
  - collect_render_diagnostics: invalid SVG envelope detection

Diagnostics are sorted by severity (errors first), then by source
location, then by stage and error code for deterministic output.

The text output format now shows stage, severity, error code, rule ID,
and remediation hints for each diagnostic entry.

Update Cargo.lock with serde_yaml 0.9.34, ryu, and unsafe-libyaml
dependencies added via the parser crate.

Add CLI integration tests:
  - validate --format pretty produces structured JSON with diagnostics
  - validate --fail-on warning returns non-zero for cyclic graphs
  - validate --diagnostics-out writes artifact file to disk

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
